IGPL is India’s largest PAN producer with 2,75,000 MTPA consolidated Uses the globally dominant gas-phase catalytic partial oxidation
capacity. Three strategically located plants — Taloja, Mangalore, of ortho-xylene (o-xylene) with ir — accounts for >95% of global PAN
and Dahej — provide logistical advantages and significant economies production. Employs advanced fixed-bed tubular reactors with

efficiency.
